div.div:
fanotify.Watcher
FAN_REPORT_DFID_NAME mode (kernel ≥ 5.17)
mask: FAN_CREATE | FAN_MOVED_TO | FAN_DELETE |
FAN_MOVED_FROM | FAN_ONDIR

div.div:
flowpublisher
PublishAppeared(name):
parse flowID; read flow_def.json
Create MxlFlow if absent (spec never overwritten)
upsertLocation: phase=Origin, lastObserved=now
PublishVanished(name): upsertLocation phase=Stale

div.div:
domainpublisher
(independent ticker)
statfs(domain) → capacityBytes / freeBytes
FanotifyReady flag
writes MxlDomain.status on each tick

div.div:
intentsock.Server
Accept(); SetDeadline(30s)
SO_PEERCRED → caller's host PID
decode line-delimited JSON {"path": …}

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 638px; height: 1px; padding-top: 460px; margin-left: 781px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: none; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
intent.Dispatcher.Materialize(pid, path)
1. FlowIDFromPath(domain, path) (early-reject)
2. flowExistsLocally(flowID)? → return ok (race)
3. podlookup.PodForPID(pid)
4. resolveSourceNode(flowID) ←── MxlFlow.status
5. ensureMirror(flowID, sourceNode, pod)
name = MirrorName(flowID, this node)
Spec.Requestor = pod ref (UID + ns + name)
6. waitReady(mirror) (poll status, 5s cap)

API server
• MxlFlow.status (read)
• MxlFlowMirror (create + poll status)

div.div:
Shared client
Both paths use the same controller-runtime client.Client constructed in main.go. The two goroutine families are otherwise independent; fanotify can run with the intent socket disabled (cfg.IntentSocketPath empty) and vice versa.
